Title: Verify login with valid credentials
Test Steps: Enter valid email and password and click login

Title: Verify login with invalid credentials
Test Steps: Enter valid email and invalid password

Title: Verify account creation with valid details
Test Steps: Enter valid signup details and submit

Title: Verify forgot password functionality
Test Steps: Click forgot password and reset password

Title: Verify login with SQL injection input
Test Steps: Enter SQL injection string in fields
Expected Result: Login should fail and input sanitized

Title: Verify no results message for invalid search
Verify search with very long input string
Expected Result: System handles input and returns result or error gracefully

Title: Verify product catalogue page loads correctly
Verify product page with missing data
Expected Result: UI handles missing fields without crash

Title: Verify delete from cart removes product
Verify adding out-of-stock product
Test Steps: Attempt to add product to cart
Expected Result: Error shown and item not added

Title: Verify cart persistence after logout and login
Preconditions: User logged in with items in cart

Title: Verify cart behavior on browser refresh
Verify maximum quantity limit enforcement
Expected Result: System restricts quantity and shows message

Title: Verify only one payment option selectable
Verify order not created on payment failure
Verify order cancellation if payment succeeds but order fails
Verify order placement after successful payment
Verify duplicate payment prevention on multiple clicks
Verify payment timeout handling
Expected Result: Timeout message shown and retry option available

Title: Verify system behavior on network failure during payment
Expected Result: Payment fails gracefully without order creation

Title: Verify checkout with empty address fields
Verify session timeout during checkout
Test Steps: Wait for session timeout and proceed

Title: Verify order not duplicated on page refresh after payment
Verify order history update after successful order
